items.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
items.dek: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
items.body: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
items.dek: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.
items.body: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.
items.author: IriLine Desk
